title: S&P 500 Sector Weights: The 25-Year Rotation (2000-2026)
description: Tech crashed from 25% to 15% after the dot-com bust — then climbed back above 30%. A 25-year time-lapse of how the S&P 500 reshuffled itself.

schemas.headline: S&P 500 Sector Weights: The 25-Year Rotation (2000-2026)
schemas.description: Analysis of how S&P 500 sector composition has changed over 25 years, from the dot-com bubble to the current tech concentration.
